intro.title: Where you live should be a <highlight>choice</highlight>, not a limitation
intro.info: 147 residence permits obtained across 8 jurisdictions since 2018

possibilities.title: Eight Jurisdictions. One Standard of Case Management.
possibilities.additionalInfo: We select the jurisdiction based on your profile, not the other way around. Each destination is managed by an on-site team.

montenegro.title: Montenegro
montenegro.ourExperience: We have been working with the Montenegrin destination since 2013. We manage the case from the initial consultation to receiving the card.
montenegro.hook: A direct path to a residence permit without buying real estate. Suitable for passive income holders and remote professionals.

spain.title: Spain
spain.importantText: Digital Nomad Visa / Non-Lucrative Residence Permit
spain.ourExperience: We support you from apostille to registration in Spain. An on-site partner handles all communication with the consulate.
spain.hook: Schengen residence permit with the right of residency for the whole family. Income is verified via remote employment or contracts.

serbia.title: Serbia
serbia.ourExperience: We assist with address registration, account opening, and residence permit processing. We know the local specifics of each district.
serbia.hook: A clear path to permanent residency in three years. Minimal physical presence requirements in the country.

france.title: France
france.ourExperience: We prepare the dossier according to prefecture requirements. We monitor deadlines and provide support at all stages.
france.hook: One of the few paths to the EU without real estate investment. Suitable for specialists and rentiers.

malta.title: Malta
malta.ourExperience: We cooperate with licensed Maltese agents. Full support throughout the naturalization track.
malta.hook: The only EU citizenship via naturalization through an investment track. The passport opens access to 185 countries.

greece.title: Greece
greece.importantText: Golden Visa / Residence Permit via Real Estate Investment
greece.ourExperience: We coordinate legal support for the transaction and the submission of residence permit documents in a single process.
greece.hook: The most affordable Golden Visa in the EU. No physical presence requirements — the card remains valid under any schedule.

cyprus.title: Cyprus
cyprus.importantText: Residence Permit based on Income / Investment
cyprus.ourExperience: We help structure assets for Cypriot residency. We work closely with local lawyers and banks.
cyprus.hook: Low tax burden and an English-speaking environment. Residence permit without mandatory stay, convenient for business.

hungary.title: Hungary
hungary.importantText: Guest Investor Card / Residence Permit via Investment
hungary.ourExperience: We have been tracking the program since its launch. We guide clients based on current requirements without outdated templates.
hungary.hook: A new program with a low entry barrier to the EU. Suitable for digital entrepreneurs and investors.

armenia.title: Armenia
armenia.importantText: Residence Permit via Sole Proprietor / LLC Registration
armenia.ourExperience: We open a company and process the residence permit in a single trip. We know the details of banking compliance in Yerevan.
armenia.hook: A quick start for entrepreneurs and IT professionals. Residence permit without real estate investments.

georgia.title: Georgia
georgia.ourExperience: We support property purchase and residence permit registration simultaneously. We work directly with the local registry.
georgia.hook: Territorial taxation system. One of the fastest residence permits in the region.

uae.title: UAE
uae.ourExperience: We process applications in Dubai and Abu Dhabi, including Emirates ID and bank account opening. Perfect for investors and founders.
uae.hook: Zero personal income tax and a residency permit valid for up to 10 years.

portugal.title: Portugal
portugal.ourExperience: We handle NIF generation, account opening, and residence permit submission remotely. We accompany you to the SEF/AIMA interview.
portugal.hook: A direct path to permanent residency and citizenship after 5 years. No mandatory real estate investments required.

italy.title: Italy
italy.importantText: Passive Income Residence Permit / Elective Residency
italy.ourExperience: We assist with the translation and legalization of documents for the Italian consulate. We control submission deadlines.
italy.hook: Residence permit for rentiers and retirees without the right to work. Full access to the Italian healthcare system.

thailand.title: Thailand
thailand.ourExperience: We select the visa track tailored to the client's profile — from remote work to retirement income.
thailand.hook: Visa for 5–10 years without a strict link to real estate. Suitable for remote professionals and retirees.

vanuatu.title: Vanuatu
vanuatu.ourExperience: We coordinate due diligence and application submission remotely. Passport issuance time is one of the shortest in the world.
vanuatu.hook: Visa-free access to the Schengen area and the UK. The fastest citizenship by investment program.

process.title: Three Stages. From Profile Evaluation to the Residence Permit Card.

step_1.title: Diagnostic Consultation
step_1.text: We evaluate your profile, income sources, and goals. We select the jurisdiction and program where your case has the highest chances of success.

step_2.title: Document Preparation
step_2.text: We collect the set of documents, manage translation, and notary certification. Each document is thoroughly checked before submission to the authority.

step_3.title: Approval & Relocation Support
step_3.text: We submit the case, track its status, and provide post-approval support: bank account opening, tax number setup, and renewals.

aboutUs.title: We manage cases from within the jurisdiction, not remotely.
aboutUs.text: Since 2013, the Aurion team has been operating on the ground in Montenegro, and since 2018, we have processed 147 residence permits across six jurisdictions. We limit the number of active cases we take on simultaneously to ensure each is managed by a dedicated specialist, not a queue.

team.title: On-Site Team Since 2013
team.text: We manage cases from the inside, not remotely — this shortens timelines and eliminates risks during submission.

specialist.title: One Specialist — One Case
specialist.text: You work with a specific person from the first consultation until you receive your card.

continious.title: Post-Approval Support
continious.text: Bank account setup, tax number registration, and residence permit renewals are included in our scope of work, not sold separately.

cases.title: Cases successfully brought to a residence permit card.

montenegroBusiness.outcome: Residence permit for a family of four under a single basis.
montenegroBusiness.description: An applicant with passive income obtained a residence permit for himself, his spouse, and two children within one submission.

spainNomad.outcome: Digital Nomad Visa for a remote specialist.
spainNomad.description: An IT professional verified income through foreign contracts and obtained a Schengen residence permit with the right to reside in the EU.

UAE.outcome: 10-year Golden Visa for an IT company founder
UAE.description: The founder processed a long-term residence permit along with an Emirates ID and a corporate bank account without leaving the country.

finalCta.title: Program conditions change quarterly. Submitting today means dealing with yesterday's requirements.
finalCta.text: During a 30-minute consultation, we will evaluate your profile and provide realistic timelines for your chosen jurisdiction.

footer.description: AI-powered platform for evaluation, forecasting, and comparison of land and real estate value in international markets.

privacy.en: Your data is protected and never shared with third parties.

Metadata.title: Aurion — International Migration Consulting | Residence Permits & Citizenship
Metadata.description: Expert assistance in obtaining residence permits, permanent residency, and citizenship across 12 jurisdictions: Montenegro, Spain, UAE, France, and more. 147 successfully approved cases since 2018. Evaluate your chances during a consultation.
Metadata.ogImage: Presentation card of Aurion migration agency. Set against a deep dark blue background with a subtle technical grid, the following elements are aligned vertically: a golden graphic logo shaped as the letter A with a rising sun, an elegant serif header reading 'Where you live should be a choice, not a limitation', and official consulting performance statistics.

jsonLd.name: Aurion
jsonLd.description: International migration consulting. Processing of residence permits, permanent residency, and citizenship across 8 jurisdictions: Montenegro, Spain, Greece, Cyprus, Malta, UAE. 147 approved cases since 2018.
